invariants.claim: BTC UTXO seal semantics live outside NovaSeal core.
Every signed BTC UTXO seal intent commits to NovaSealCanonicalEnvelopeV0.
The active seal binds BTC txid, vout, satoshi amount, and scriptPubKey hash.
Closure consumes the active seal Cell and materialises a terminal receipt only.
invariants.location: consume old_cell and create receipt statements

invariants.claim: Closure binds spend txid, wtxid, input index, transition commitment, and payout commitment.
The seal owner authority signs the closure intent.
invariants.location: owner_sig pubkey guard and BIP340 verifier call

invariants.claim: Closure increments nonce exactly once and rejects u64 overflow.
A live devnet BTC UTXO seal closure must exist before V1 readiness.
Public BTC UTXO spend verification remains external to this package.
